name: electric-shepherd
description: Policy layer for MemPalace memory consolidation (Dreamer).

scripts.policy:example: node --experimental-strip-types scripts/run-policy-cycle.ts --query "active architecture decisions" --scope-room context-blocks --scope-wing context-blocks
